name: Grounded Body Bar Uplifting Eucalyptus & Aloe 150g
shortDescription: Boost your senses and embrace a nurturing experience with this body bar. Leaves your skin feeling hydrated and refreshed. Whether used for a luxurious body cleanse or as a hair-loving care, indulge in its versatile goodness.
description: 100% natural bathing bars for body and hair. Choose our original calming lavender, or our new activated charcoal mint, and uplifting aloe eucalyptus. Dry brush your body before a relaxing shower with which is a great exfoliator. The firm but gentle sisal bristles reveal healthier, smoother, and more radiant skin, after a session of dry brushing. Uplifting – with moringa, aloe, and eucalyptus essential oil
